# LiveCharts2

LiveCharts2 (v2) is a flexible, cross-platform charting library for .NET built on top of SkiaSharp for rendering; it supports Cartesian, Pie, Polar, and GeoMap chart types with smooth, automatic animations. The library uses a layered architecture separating a platform-agnostic Core from a SkiaSharp-based Renderer and platform-specific Views (WPF, Avalonia, MAUI, Blazor, etc.), so adding a new platform requires minimal effort. LiveCharts2 targets .NET Framework 4.6.2, .NET Standard 2.0, and modern .NET, and uses `INotifyPropertyChanged`/`INotifyCollectionChanged` for zero-boilerplate automatic chart updates.

> **⚠️ Important: This is LiveCharts v2. Do NOT use v0 syntax.**
> The legacy v0 (`LiveCharts` / `LiveCharts.Wpf` NuGet packages) is obsolete and has a completely different API.
> v0 source and samples: https://github.com/Live-Charts/Live-Charts
> Always use the v2 packages listed below and the v2 documentation at https://livecharts.dev.

## Supported UI Frameworks

- **MAUI** — `LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.Maui` — https://www.nuget.org/packages/LiveChartsCore.skiasharpview.maui
- **Uno Platform (WinUI)** — `LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.Uno.WinUI` — https://www.nuget.org/packages/LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.Uno.WinUI
- **Avalonia** — `LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.Avalonia` — https://www.nuget.org/packages/LiveChartsCore.skiasharpview.avalonia
- **WPF** — `LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF` — https://www.nuget.org/packages/LiveChartsCore.skiasharpview.wpf
- **WinForms** — `LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WinForms` — https://www.nuget.org/packages/LiveChartsCore.skiasharpview.winforms
- **WinUI** — `LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WinUI` — https://www.nuget.org/packages/LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.winui
- **Blazor (WASM)** — `LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.Blazor` — https://www.nuget.org/packages/LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.blazor
- **Eto.Forms** — `LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.Eto` — https://www.nuget.org/packages/LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.eto

## URL Templates

### API Reference

```
https://livecharts.dev/api/{LiveChartsVersion}/{objectFullName}
```

- `{objectFullName}` follows CLI (Common Language Infrastructure) metadata naming conventions, e.g. `LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF.CartesianChart`
- `{LiveChartsVersion}`: use `latest` for the latest version, or a specific version string (e.g. `2.0.0-rc6.1`)
- Full list of available versions: `https://livecharts.dev/docs/{UIFramework}/list`
  - `{UIFramework}` is one of: `maui`, `unowinui`, `avalonia`, `eto`, `blazor`, `wpf`, `winforms`, `winui`

**Examples:**
- `https://livecharts.dev/api/latest/LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF.CartesianChart`
- `https://livecharts.dev/api/latest/LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.Avalonia.PieChart`

### Documentation & Examples

```
https://livecharts.dev/docs/{UIFramework}/{LiveChartsVersion}/{ArticleName}
```

`{UIFramework}` and `{LiveChartsVersion}` are as described above.

Available `{ArticleName}` values:

**Overview**
- `Overview.Installation`
- `Overview.How%20it%20works`
- `Overview.Automatic%20updates`
- `Overview.Mappers`
- `Overview.Paints`
- `Overview.Animations`

**Cartesian Chart**
- `CartesianChart.Cartesian%20chart%20control`
- `CartesianChart.Axes%20properties`
- `CartesianChart.Tooltips`
- `CartesianChart.Legends`
- `CartesianChart.Line%20series%20properties`
- `CartesianChart.Column%20series%20properties`
- `CartesianChart.Scatter%20series%20properties`
- `CartesianChart.Step%20line%20series%20properties`
- `CartesianChart.Heat%20series%20properties`
- `CartesianChart.Candle%20sticks%20series%20properties`
- `CartesianChart.Stacked%20line%20series%20properties`
- `CartesianChart.Stacked%20column%20series%20properties`
- `CartesianChart.Stacked%20step%20line%20series%20properties`
- `CartesianChart.Box%20series%20properties`

**Pie Chart**
- `PieChart.Pie%20chart%20control`
- `PieChart.Pie%20series`
- `PieChart.Gauges`

**Polar Chart**
- `PolarChart.Polar%20chart%20control`
- `PolarChart.Polar%20line%20series`

**GeoMap**
- `GeoMap.GeoMap%20control`
- `GeoMap.Heat%20land%20series`

**About**
- `About.About%20this%20samples`

**Samples**
- `samples.lines.basic`
- `samples.lines.straight`
- `samples.lines.area`
- `samples.lines.custom`
- `samples.lines.custompoints`
- `samples.lines.autoupdate`
- `samples.lines.xy`
- `samples.lines.zoom`
- `samples.steplines.basic`
- `samples.stackedArea.basic`
- `samples.stackedArea.stepArea`
- `samples.bars.basic`
- `samples.bars.withBackground`
- `samples.bars.custom`
- `samples.bars.spacing`
- `samples.bars.layered`
- `samples.bars.rowsWithLabels`
- `samples.bars.delayedAnimation`
- `samples.bars.race`
- `samples.stackedBars.basic`
- `samples.stackedBars.groups`

- `samples.pies.gauge2`
- `samples.pies.gauge3`
- `samples.pies.gauge4`
- `samples.pies.gauge5`
- `samples.pies.angularGauge`
- `samples.error.basic`
- `samples.box.basic`
- `samples.scatter.basic`
- `samples.scatter.bubbles`
- `samples.scatter.custom`
- `samples.financial.basicCandlesticks`
- `samples.heat.basic`
- `samples.polar.basic`
- `samples.polar.radialArea`
- `samples.polar.coordinates`
- `samples.maps.world`
- `samples.events.tutorial`
- `samples.events.addPointOnClick`
- `samples.axes.labelsFormat`
- `samples.axes.labelsFormat2`
- `samples.axes.multiple`
- `samples.axes.shared`
- `samples.axes.style`
- `samples.axes.crosshairs`
- `samples.axes.dateTimeScaled`
- `samples.axes.timeSpanScaled`
- `samples.axes.matchScale`
- `samples.axes.logarithmic`
- `samples.axes.customSeparatorsInterval`
- `samples.axes.paging`
- `samples.general.multiThreading`
- `samples.general.realTime`
- `samples.general.sections`
- `samples.general.chartToImage`
- `samples.general.visualElements`
- `samples.general.visibility`
- `samples.general.nullPoints`
- `samples.general.customTooltips`
- `samples.general.customLegends`
- `samples.general.mapPoints`
- `samples.general.drawOnCanvas`
- `samples.general.conditionalDraw`
- `samples.general.scrollable`
- `samples.design.linearGradients`
- `samples.design.radialGradients`
- `samples.design.strokeDashArray`
